rationale: Romania's president nominating a new Liberal PM is a direct domestic political development affecting governance and EU fund access; the US-Iran deal remains a secondary energy-price concern.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: A new government formation attempt directly affects Romania's political stability, EU fund disbursement, and economic direction. This is a fresh qualitative domestic change for Romanian residents.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal signing disputed — Sunday timeline unclear
top_events.summary: A confirmed Iran deal could ease energy costs for Romania, but conflicting signals mean no change yet. Continuation of prior uncertainty with no new resolution.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Seizure of a Russian shadow fleet vessel is modestly relevant to Romania given Black Sea security and interest in enforcing Russia sanctions, but geographically distant.
